contentType.description: The MIME type of the inscription.

wishTxid.description: The transaction ID of the wish inscription.

regTxid.description: The transaction ID of the registry payment, if any.

address.description: The ordinal address of the creator.

registered.description: Whether the wish is registered for the marketplace.

feeRate.description: The fee rate used for the inscription.

status.description: Status of the inscription (e.g., pending, confirmed).

/inscriptions/{inscriptionId}.description: Global collection of all wishes cast in the well.
